entry.title: New: CR 24-93 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 115, CD1 (2024) to allow property owners who are leasing their property to individuals directly displaced by the August 2023 Maui wildfires to file a claim for a home exemption or long-term rental exemption, or both, by December 31, 2025, for the tax year beginning July 1, 2025.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
